$meta.purpose: Machine-readable design rules for AI-driven design generation

sans.role: Primary typeface. Used for all general UI elements, navigation, buttons, titles, and card contents.

mono.role: Monospace typeface. Used for code strings, terminal snippets, API resource IDs, times/dates, and keyboard shortcut indicators (e.g. Ctrl K).

heading.role: Heading typeface. Inherits from font-sans; relies on weight variation instead of custom typography.

typeScale.usage: Category headers in sidebar (e.g., 'OBSERVE', 'BUILD'), Switch Account dropdown label, small metadata labels.
Default size for dashboard content. Card descriptions, metadata strings, search bar input placeholders, subtext/captions.
Main navigation links in sidebar, primary headers, button texts, standard table content, search input values.
Standard article body reading copy (rarely used in dense dashboards).
Section headers inside drawers and settings blocks.
Main card titles (e.g. 'See what's new', topic grids).
Page headers, main welcome headers (e.g. 'Welcome to Cloudflare Support').

weightGuidelines.font-normal: Use for primary description blocks, paragraph texts, and secondary fields.
weightGuidelines.font-medium: Use for standard interactive states, form inputs, and button components.
weightGuidelines.font-semibold: Use for sub-module headers, table headers, and navigation list items.
weightGuidelines.font-bold: Use for primary cards titles and capitalized category titles.
weightGuidelines.font-extrabold: Use for top-level headers to establish strong layout hierarchy.
